name: Chocolate Pecan Pie
recipeIngredient: One and a half cups pecan halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare crust according to package directions. Roll out on lightly floured board into a circle two inches larger than the 9-inch pan. Line pie plate with pastry. Trim pastry edge, leaving overhang and fold overhang under and flute edges. Set aside.
3. In a 2-quart saucepan over low heat, melt butter and chocolate together until smooth. Remove saucepan from heat.
4. With a fork, beat in corn syrup, sugar, vanilla, salt, and eggs. Beat until well blended.
5. Arrange pecans on bottom of pie crust. Carefully pour egg mixture over pecans.
6. Bake for one hour or until a knife inserted 1 inch from the edge comes clean. Cool on rack. Serve garnished with whipped cream or make your own favorite crust.
